name: TAKE TWO INTERACTIVE SOFTWARE INC
business: Take-Two Interactive develops, publishes, and markets interactive entertainment products for console gaming systems, mobile devices, and personal computers. It delivers products through physical retail, digital download, online platforms, and cloud streaming services. The company sells to consumers globally through direct digital storefronts, platform partners, large retail customers, and third-party distributors.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading developer, publisher, and marketer of interactive entertainment for consumers around the globe.

We are continually innovating the design and development of our products, including by investing in artificial intelligence ("AI") tools and technologies, in order to enhance game play, anticipate changes in consumer behavior, and evolve our business as new dynamics develop.

catalysts.sentence: Rockstar plans to release Grand Theft Auto VI on November 19, 2026.
